/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/uam_core_tests.dir/tests/core_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uam_core_tests.dir/src/core/app_models.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uam_core_tests.dir/src/core/app_paths.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uam_core_tests.dir/src/core/frontend_actions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uam_core_tests.dir/src/core/gemini_command_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uam_core_tests.dir/src/core/gemini_template_catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uam_core_tests.dir/src/core/chat_repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uam_core_tests.dir/src/core/provider_profile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uam_core_tests.dir/src/core/provider_runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uam_core_tests.dir/src/core/settings_store.cpp.o -o uam_core_tests
